S

saveConfig(String, String, String, String) - Static method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.DBConfig
Saves database credentials to a local properties file.
SCENE_HEIGHT - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils.NodeConsts
Default application scene height.
SCENE_WIDTH - Static variable in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils.NodeConsts
Default application scene width.
seedDevelopers() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.Database
Seeds the developers table with default entries if it is empty.
seedPlatforms() - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.database.Database
Seeds the platforms table with default values if it is empty.
setGenre(String) - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
Sets genre.
setImageUrl(String) - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
Sets image URL.
setTitle(String) - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
Sets game title.
setYear(int) - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.pojo.Game
Sets release year.
showExitConfirmation() - Static method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.utils.NodeConsts
Displays a confirmation dialog before exiting the application.
showMainScene(Stage) - Static method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.HelloApplication
Builds and displays the main application UI.
start(Stage) - Method in class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.HelloApplication
Initializes and starts the JavaFX application.
StatisticsTab - Class in org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs
JavaFX tab for displaying statistical insights of games in the library using a pie chart.
StatisticsTab() - Constructor for class org.example.sheikh_jackson_javaproject.tabs.StatisticsTab
Constructs the StatisticsTab and initializes UI components, including the selector for grouping and the pie chart.
